CVE-2020-11932.title: It was discovered that the Subiquity installer for Ubuntu Server  ...
CVE-2020-11932.summary: It was discovered that the Subiquity installer for Ubuntu Server logged the LUKS full disk encryption password if one was entered.

CVE-2022-0555.title: Subiquity Shows Guided Storage Passphrase in Plaintext with Read- ...
CVE-2022-0555.summary: Subiquity Shows Guided Storage Passphrase in Plaintext with Read-all Permissions

CVE-2023-5182.title: Sensitive data could be exposed in logs of subiquity version 23.0 ...
CVE-2023-5182.summary: Sensitive data could be exposed in logs of subiquity version 23.09.1 and earlier. An attacker in the adm group could use this information to find hashed passwords and possibly escalate their privilege.

CVE-2023-5536.title: A feature in LXD (LP#1829071), affects the default configuration  ...
CVE-2023-5536.summary: A feature in LXD (LP#1829071), affects the default configuration of Ubuntu Server which allows privileged users in the lxd group to escalate their privilege to root without requiring a sudo password.
